title: Veesum Velichathile Lyrics Naan Ee Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song : Veesum velichathile
Singer: Karthik,Shaithi
Lyrics : Karky
Music : Maragatha Mani
Movie: Naan Ee

Veesum velichathile 
thugalaai naan varuven
pesum vennilave, unake oli tharuven
ada adadadada..oh
ada adadadada..oh

Nunsilai seithidum pon silaiye
pencil-ai seevidum pen silaiye
en nilai konjam ne paarpaaya?
ada adadadada..oh
ada adadadada..oh

Oru murai paarpaaya , irudhaya pechai ketpaaya
Marumurai paarpaaya, vizhigalil kaadhal solvaaya
ada adadadada..oh
ada adadadada..oh

Un bootha kannaadi thevai illai
en kadhal nee paarka kan podhume
Muthangal thaluvalgal thevai illai
Ne paarkum nimidangal athu podhume
kovam yekkam kaamam vekkam, Yetho ondril paaradi

Oru murai paarpaaya , irudhaya pechai ketpaaya

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Veesum Velichathile expresses the joy and excitement of love, portraying a romantic connection between the characters.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Naan Ee, the song highlights the emotional bond between the protagonists, enhancing the romantic theme of the film.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Karthik and Shaithi, with music composed by Maragatha Mani.

When was the song released?

Veesum Velichathile was released on July 25, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Veesum Velichathile, the vibrant melodies and heartfelt lyrics encapsulate the essence of love and joy. The song serves as a beautiful backdrop to the romantic moments in Naan Ee, showcasing the deep connection between the characters. With its upbeat rhythm and engaging vocals, it evokes feelings of happiness and celebration. This duet is a perfect anthem for lovers and those celebrating special moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Veesum Velichathile from Naan Ee is a delightful romantic duet that captures the essence of love with its enchanting melodies. The collaboration between Karthik and Shaithi brings a vibrant energy that resonates with listeners. With Maragatha Mani's captivating composition and Karky's poetic lyrics, this song is sure to uplift your spirits.
stanzaMeanings: In the shining light, I will come like a star and speak to you, I will give you light, oh oh..

Have you seen me once, have you heard my heart's words? Have you seen me again, does love speak through your eyes? oh oh..
You don't need a mirror to see my love, just a glance is enough. No need for jewels, just a moment of your gaze is enough to ignite anger and desire, look at me in some way.
